particulars.description: Land at frances court 24/26 lancaster road, south norwood, croydon. Together with all buildings and erections thereon and all fixtures whatsoever now or at any time hereafter affixed or attached to the property or any part thereof other than trade machinery as defined by section 5 of the bills of sale act 1878.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
